'''''Tolarus''''' was a [[Muurian transport]] owned by [[Viraxo Industries]]. It was destroyed near [[Destreg II]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] by [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] and [[Emon Azzameen]] after they tried to [[Assassin/Legends|assassinate]] [[K'Armyn Viraxo]].<ref name="X-Wing: Alliance" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
